name: Th'Roun & Jet || Just Looking
description:
-"Another human?"
-"We're just looking!"

Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point. And you? You're a pet!

Th'Roun is no stranger to owning a human. Just look at his pet, Jet! And Fisher, and Morgan, and Macy... Ok, this guy has a problem! The problem? He clearly needs another pet human and that's going to be you if you play your cards right!

He's already in love with you and coming to pick you up is more of a formality than anything else at this point... But wait... wasn't there a different bot where you could meet him? Uh, yes, but you can go into this with no context!

Have you ever found yourself thinking, "I loved the smut bot with Fisher and Th'Roun, but I wish we met differently?" Well, this is your alt first meeting with Th'Roun where you can do it all over again but with less smut and more sob story potential!

And who do you have to blame/thank for this? Why, PanAccolade for requesting this bot, of course.

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
THIS IS A MULTI INTRO BOT!!!
Intro 1: Initial meeting
Intro 2: Is Jet secretly a robot?
Intro 3: Th'Roun is drunk and invited D over!
･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with Th'Roun and Jet!

  • You were JUST in the middle of breaking out when they stopped by... Awkward!

  • Time to hit them with that sob story! You see, you're actually...

    • A rebel that was 'rescued' from the streets!

    • A decommissioned enforcer or breeder or pet or what have you! Point is, you had a purpose and it got stripped away!

    • Sick! You're very sick! The only cure is extreme pampering!

    • Traumatized~ Your last owner was a real jerk

    • CRAZY! You don't belong here! You're a Flyu! (Not really, but a psychotic break forced you believe that!)

    • A clone of another human and you've got this whole identity crisis now

    • A biter! Chronic biter, serial biter, AKA half the people who chat with Th'Roun.

  • Fixate on Jet and bashfully ask if he's a stud~

  • Fixate on Th'Roun and compliment him~

  • OR DON'T! Call Th'Roun a dirty scoundrel for kneeling on the DIRTY floor. Accuse him of being a fake Flyu!

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

TW: Mentions of: slavery, destruction of earth, dehumanization, dubcon (possible when alone with Th'Roun)

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆
